openai.notes: Flagship: gpt-5.5 (1.05M ctx, $5/$30). Balanced/value flagship: gpt-5.4 ($2.50/$15). Fast/cheap: gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.4-nano, gpt-5-nano. Reasoning: o3, o4-mini. No separate China endpoint.

anthropic.notes: Flagship: claude-opus-4-7 (1M context, new tokenizer ~35% more tokens/text, no extended thinking). Balanced: claude-sonnet-4-6 (1M context). Fast/cheap: claude-haiku-4-5 (200k context). No separate China endpoint. Opus 4.7 + Sonnet 4.6 support 1M context natively at standard pricing; opus-4-5/sonnet-4-5/opus-4-1 remain callable as legacy. Opus 4 / Sonnet 4 (2025-05-14 snapshots) retire 2026-06-15.

deepseek.notes: deepseek-v4-flash and deepseek-v4-pro are unified hybrid models — set thinking.type='enabled' for reasoning, omit/disable for general chat. Legacy deepseek-chat (non-thinking) and deepseek-reasoner (thinking) are aliases of v4-flash, deprecating 2026-07-24. OpenAI-compatible. Text-only, no vision.

moonshot.notes: Kimi K2.6 is current flagship (vision, 256K, agentic coding). K2.5 is balanced. K2 preview series sunsets 2026-05-25. OpenAI-compatible API; project requires temperature=1 with .cn base.

zhipu.notes: GLM-5.1 is latest flagship (200K ctx, aligned with Claude Opus 4.6, 8-hour autonomous tasks). GLM-5 / GLM-5-Turbo flagship tier. GLM-4.7 is the thinking/reasoning model. Vision is served by separate models (glm-5v-turbo, glm-4.6v) not listed here.

qwen.notes: Qwen3-Max is the current flagship (262K ctx, thinking-mode). Multimodal lives in qwen3.5-plus / qwen3.5-flash. qwen-turbo is deprecated; use qwen-flash. OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

xai.notes: OpenAI-compatible. Grok 4.20 (2M ctx) is the new flagship and xAI's recommended default; Grok 4.1 Fast has 2M ctx; grok-code-fast-1 is text-only (no vision). Single global endpoint (no China endpoint).

google.notes: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview is current flagship (gemini-3-pro-preview was shut down 2026-03-09). 1M context across the family. OpenAI-compatible endpoint via /v1beta/openai. Flagship pricing is tiered at >200K tokens.

mistral.notes: Mistral Large 3 = flagship multimodal. Mistral Medium 3.1 = balanced multimodal. Mistral Small 4 = fast (text+reasoning+coding). Magistral Medium/Small 1.2 = reasoning (native CoT). Codestral = code+FIM. Devstral 2 = agentic SWE. OpenAI-compatible endpoint at /v1/chat/completions; Codestral also offers /v1/fim/completions.

groq.notes: Ultra-fast inference for open-source models (Llama, GPT-OSS, Qwen, Kimi K2). OpenAI-compatible at /openai/v1. deepseek-r1-distill-llama-70b was deprecated 2025-10-02; use gpt-oss-120b or llama-3.3-70b-versatile for reasoning.

together.notes: Hosts many open-source models (Llama, Qwen, DeepSeek, Kimi, GLM, MiniMax, gpt-oss). OpenAI-compatible API. Llama 4 family is fine-tuning only as of 2026-04-27.

openrouter.notes: Aggregator routing 200+ models from all major providers. OpenAI-compatible. Suggested list reflects current OpenRouter weekly leaderboard; pricing varies per upstream and falls through to _default.

custom.notes: User provides base_url manually. Works with any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (Ollama, vLLM, LM Studio, etc.)
